subcodes.first_line: O my ancient friend! Such is my longing that I may commune with thee each day and correspond with thee in writing [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یار دیرین مرا آرزو چنان که هر روز با تو مخابره نمایم و نامه نگارم و
subcodes.subjects: @eulogies; reminiscences, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @martyrs and martyrdom
